entries.back_en: Ah! Behold now that legion of beasts; see the burning/ardor
entries.note: 'fiends' (demônios) virou 'feras' (beasts); 'burning' como 'ardor' aceitável mas frase truncada.

entries.back_en: Tell me, by what ruse intendest thou to lure
the beast as a moth to the flame?
entries.note: 'siren flame' perdeu o 'siren' (chama da sereia/sedutora), só 'chama'.

entries.back_en: H-H-Hold! If I weave the magic thread so ensorcelled--
entries.note: Estilo de fala ceceada preservado; 'ley-thread'→'fio mágico' aceitável.

entries.back_en: Would such a spell not... lure it directly toward
Methinks thou tarried too much before answering!
Speak truth -- is there any d-danger?
entries.note: 'is there no danger?' (negativa/expectativa de reasseguração) virou 'há algum perigo?' (any); muda nuance. Typo 'algun'.

entries.back_en: Yes... Yes, in good faith! For in what else can a man place his
his unwavering belief, if not in his bosom friends?
entries.note: Fiel, 'amigos do peito' equivale a 'bosom friends'.

entries.back_en: Look not to another, for the loyal Maroro
shall fulfill the fateful mission! Excelsior!
